message: Release checkout-2026.06.17 changed 12 files across auth, billing, release gate, and dashboard filters. Please publish risk facts before QA planning.
Risk score is 71. Auth callback contract changed without matching nonce replay tests. Invoice retry branch bypasses dead-letter handling. Release gate API payload contract changed.
Recommended tests: OAuth nonce replay regression, invoice retry exhaustion coverage, release gate API contract fixture diff. Owners are Platform, Payments, and DevEx.
Decision remains hold-for-human-review. Do not auto-promote until the evidence packet and generated tests are reviewed.
